item.title: LEGO Creator 10269 Harley Davidson Fatboy Expert Series 16 ans à 99 ans 10269
item.description: Vous avez LEGO Creator 10269 Harley Davidson Fatboy Expert Series 16 ans à 99 ans 10269 ici: ℹ️: Authentic colour scheme in dark red and black. RPA20. 232023This LEGO motorcycle is a fantastic display piece for home or office. Features Lakester wheels with brake discs and solid wheels, teardrop tank with Harley Davidson logos and integrated speedometer, Milwaukee Eight engine with moving piston, two exhaust pipes, handlebars, movable gear pedal and brake levers, motorcycle stand and a robust display stand.
